The '''Iceflake Inn''' was a vacation resort on the polar ice caps of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. The resort offered unique and elaborate slopes for turbo-skiing, private glaciers for climbing and exploring, as well as snowfields for children to play in.<ref name="CCW" />
